osis.pipeline.logpublishingoptions.CfnAb: Container for the values required to configure logging for the pipeline. If you don't specify these values, OpenSearch Ingestion will not publish logs from your application to CloudWatch Logs.

osis.pipeline.logpublishingoptions.Cloud.Description: The destination for OpenSearch Ingestion logs sent to Amazon CloudWatch Logs. This parameter is required if `IsLoggingEnabled` is set to `true`.
